entries.source: "Help me prepare for finals"
entries.value: "Pomozi mi da se pripremim za finale"

entries.source: "Make a JEE revision schedule"
entries.value: "Napravite JEE raspored revizije"

entries.source: "Plan 2 weeks for biology"
entries.value: "Plan 2 tjedna za biologiju"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Exam Prep Planner on inspir for planning learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Praktični vodič za korištenje Ispit Prep Planner na inspir za planiranje učenja, s prompti, studijske petlje, i sigurnije AI navike.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Jača studijska petlja

entries.source: AI Exam Prep Planner For Realistic Study Schedules is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Build a realistic exam plan from your date, syllabus, strengths, and weak areas.
entries.value: AI Exam Prep Planner Za realističke rasporede studija je fokusiran način za korištenje AI za učenje umjesto pasivne kolekcije odgovora. Način se gradi oko određenog posla: Izgraditi realan plan ispita od datuma, syllabusa, prednosti, i slaba područja.

entries.source: AI Exam Prep Planner Study Schedule Guide
entries.value: AI Ispitivanje Priprema Planner Studij Vodič

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI učitelj

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Traži mali prvi korak, a ne konačni odgovor.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Pitajte AI da provjerite svoje razmišljanje, a ne samo rezultat.

entries.source: Exam Prep Planner
entries.value: Planer pripreme za ispit

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Završite pisanjem ideje iz memorije.

entries.source: Plan review.
entries.value: Pregled plana.

entries.source: Planning
entries.value: Planiranje

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Prioritetizirajte teme.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Traži da pokušate

entries.source: Start the live mode at Exam Prep Planner. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Flashcard Builder. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Pokrenite način uživo na Exam Prep Planner. Ako želite susjedni format učenja, pokušajte Flashcard Builder. Za širi pogled na platformu, pročitajte što AI učeći pratilac treba učiniti za svakoga.

entries.source: Students who need a plan that balances revision, practice, confidence, and real life.
entries.value: Učenici kojima treba plan koji uravnotežuje ponavljanje, vježbu, samopouzdanje i stvarni život.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Recite načinu rada što pokušavate naučiti ili proizvesti.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Ta se razlika pojavljuje u protoku. Umjesto jedne divovske reakcije, najbolje sesije kreću kroz petlju: postaviti cilj, pokušati nešto, dobiti povratne informacije, popraviti slabu točku, i odabrati sljedeću akciju.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: To je važno. Općenito chatbot može odgovoriti gotovo na sve, ali način učenja daje razgovor oblik. To vas potiče prema vrsti razmišljanja, prakse, povratne informacije, ili istraživanja koja pomaže ideja štap.

entries.source: The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: Planer daje prioritet slabijim područjima, dodaje cikluse ponavljanja i izrađuje rezervne planove za propuštene dane.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: To je ista navika za proučavanje s AI bez varanja: zadržati učenika aktivan. AI je najkorisniji kada vam daje povratnu informaciju o vašem razmišljanju.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ovaj način rada posebno je koristan za učenike koji žele:

entries.source: Track risk areas.
entries.value: Područja rizika.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Pokušajte korak u svojim riječima.

entries.source: Use Exam Prep Planner when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Koristite Ispit Prep Planner kada želite sesiju koja počinje brzo, ali još uvijek se prilagođava na vas. Prvi cilj nije da zvuči impresivno. Prvi cilj je da se sljedeći korak osjeća moguće.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: S čime ovaj način rada pomaže

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Gdje ići sljedeće

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Možete također početi s grubom verzijom vašeg pravog problema. Neuredan prvi prompt je u redu. Sekcija može pojasniti razinu, publiku, rok, i stil nakon što počnete.
